---
title: "Report Archive"
---

## Past Reports

Browse previous weekly reports to track IBD literature over time.

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false

library(tidyverse)
library(glue)

# List all HTML files in docs folder (excluding special files)
archive_files <- list.files("docs", pattern = "^\\d{4}-\\d{2}-\\d{2}\\.html$", full.names = FALSE)

if (length(archive_files) > 0) {
  # Extract dates and sort
  archive_dates <- str_extract(archive_files, "\\d{4}-\\d{2}-\\d{2}") %>%
    as.Date() %>%
    sort(decreasing = TRUE)
  
  # Create links
  archive_links <- map_chr(archive_dates, function(date) {
    file <- glue("{date}.html")
    formatted_date <- format(date, "%B %d, %Y")
    glue("- [{formatted_date}]({file})")
  })
  
  cat(paste(archive_links, collapse = "\n"))
} else {
  cat("No archived reports yet. Check back after the first weekly update!\n")
}
```

---

::: {.callout-tip}
## Weekly Updates

New reports are published every Friday at 7:00 AM Pacific Time.

[Subscribe via RSS](rss.xml) to get notified automatically.
:::

## Download All Data

For researchers who want to analyze trends over time:

- [JSON Data Feed](data/papers.json) - Machine-readable format
- [CSV Export](data/papers.csv) - Spreadsheet-compatible format

## API Access

Interested in programmatic access to IBD LitMonitor data? Contact me to discuss API options for research collaborations.
